zh.lifeSummary: 當John Ryder於1582年6月24日出生在英國巴金哈姆爾紐波特 帕格爾時，他的父親William Ryder30歲，母親Lady Alice Plantagenet26歲。他和Helen Smythe至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1642年在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Ryder
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Rider  .
Americanized and Flemish form of Dutch Rijder: occupational name for a mounted warrior or messenger, Middle Dutch rider ‘horseman, rider’.

variants.name: Rider
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English ridere ‘horseman’, perhaps with a specific application such as ‘forest ranger’, ‘horseman who guards crops’, or ‘mounted warrior, knight’. Compare Knight .
English: habitational name from Ryther, near Selby (Yorkshire), probably from Old English ryther ‘clearing’.

English: topographic name from Middle English ridere ‘dweller at a clearing’ (see Reeder ) or ‘dweller by a small stream’, depending on which sense of Middle English ride the surname is derived from. These topographic senses of Rider are limited to the southern counties of England (especially Surrey, Sussex, and Hampshire), where topographic names in -er and the Middle English words ride ‘clearing’ and rithe ‘small stream’ are mainly found. See also Reed .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When John Ryder was born on 24 June 1582, in Newport Pagnell, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, William Ryder, was 30 and his mother, Lady Alice Plantagenet, was 26. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Helen Smythe. He died in 1642, in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60, and was buried in All Saints' Church, Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: John Ryderが1582年6月24日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアニュープオルト プアグネルで生まれた時，父William Ryderは30歳，母Lady Alice Plantagenetは26歳であった。彼はHelen Smytheとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1642年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノーサンプトンで60歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノーサンプトンアル サイントス' チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Ryder(이)가 1582년 6월 24일 영국 벅잉함실르 뉴포트 파그넬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Ryder(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice Plantagenet(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Helen Smythe(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1642년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 노르섬프턴에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 노르섬프턴 앨 세인츠' c후르치에 묻혔다.

ru.All Saints Church, Northampton, Northamp: алл сеинц' чурч, нортамптон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Ryder родился 24 июня 1582 г. в местности нюпорт пагнелл, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Ryder было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Plantagenet, 26. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Helen Smythe. Он умер в 1642 г. в местности нортамптон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности алл сеинц' чурч, нортамптон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.
